name: Thai-Style Tempe w/ Carrots & Basil
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Tempe, sliced into 1-inch x 1/2-inch pieces
3 Carrots, peeled and bias cut into about the same size as Tempe
4 Fresh hot chili peppers (Thai, Seranno, or Jalapeno), crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. Add tempe cubes and sauté until golden brown but not burned. Remove with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
2. In the same pan, add carrots and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes until slightly softened.
3. Stir fry garlic and chili peppers in the oil for 30 seconds, then add tempe cubes back into the pan. Mix everything well.
4. Add oyster sauce and sugar. Continue stir-frying for 2 more minutes.
5. Mix in fresh basil leaves (Thai or Oly basil is best) and serve over steamed rice.
Oyster sauce is not typically vegan, but there are brands available that do not contain oyster extract, only caramel and soy.
